title: the battle for your CPU
description: adds a cool way to destroy a world!
body:
A cool way to destroy a world!

You can craft a netherrack core or "just" a water bucket, which if placed(used), eats everything(exept for reinforced glass).

### WARNING!!!
**IF YOU HAVE  POTATO PC (LIKE ME) OR YOU REALLY LOVE YOUR WORLD/SERVER THAN YOU SHOULDN'T PLACE (USE) ANY OF THESE TWO BLOCKS (ITEMS), BECAUSE IT'LL LITERALLY EAT YOUR WHOLE WORLD (AND CAUSE A LOT OF LAG, WHICH WILL PROBABLY CRASH YOUR SERVER OR WORLD)!**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod is still in development, so new content will be added.

</details>
